{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Sky’s Edge gate
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Sky's Edge]] [[gate]] was expanded by [[Charity]] into a broad screen of darkness.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
